summary: A Go-based monolithic project featuring a test runner, schema validation, and MCP handlers, currently undergoing heavy automated agent-driven test expansion.
concerns: proliferation of extra test directories (0005-0025) suggests fragmented or auto-generated test suites
uncommitted modified file alongside staged changes indicates potential git state instability
heavy reliance on automated agent commits may obscure actual code changes
test files dominating the recent activity might indicate core logic is undertested or legacy
suggestions: consolidate the numerous GOrchestra/glm-agents extra test directories into a unified test suite
review and clean up the current git working tree to resolve the mixed staged/modified state
ensure core business logic in runner.go and handlers.go has equivalent non-agent-generated test coverage
document the purpose and orchestration of the glm-agents workflow
